meaning: n.拖鞋,制轮器vt.用拖鞋打(孩子等)
examples: He observed that if there are too many toys in front of Cameron, he will just keep moving round them and then end up going away and finding something like a slipper to play with.
The grandfather was often hit by Mr. Tan with a slipper.
Mr Slipper, who is married, earlier apologised for the content of the text messages.
Mr Slipper defected from opposition leader Tony Abbot's Liberal Party last year, becoming an independent.
